rawRustPressure.policy: No raw Rust escapes are used in app/test Haxe source for the current pressure-test surface.

gaps.reproduction: External codex-hxrust portable/metal profile builds generated CallStack Rust that referenced an unresolved root Exception type when the dev haxelib checkout did not expose haxe.rust std top-level entries.
gaps.workaround: Historical local CallStack.cross.hx Dynamic workaround; now removed and recorded as resolved-upstream.

gaps.reproduction: Protocol-ID hxml printed generated Cargo errors while the parent haxe process exited successfully, so harnesses needed defensive Cargo checks.
gaps.workaround: Keep generated Cargo gates in codex-hxrust even after the compiler fix; the upstream fix now propagates Cargo failure as a Haxe compiler error.

gaps.reproduction: Protocol ID validation exposed Null<Int> stringification/comparison and String.charCodeAt Option comparison lowering errors.
gaps.workaround: Generic nullable_scalar_charcode snapshot now covers the Haxe patterns; keep local DTO code straightforward and avoid raw Rust.

gaps.reproduction: Typed parse-result enums such as IdParseResult<T> generated Rust with unbound generic parameters.
gaps.workaround: Resolved by generic enum type-parameter lowering; codex-hxrust can use generic result enums where useful.

gaps.reproduction: JSON boundary helpers exposed Rust move errors when a parsed haxe.json.Value enum was passed to multiple helper calls.
gaps.workaround: Compiler now treats Haxe enum values as reusable cloneable values for typed by-value helper calls.

gaps.reproduction: Mock model stream parsing exposed a non-Void helper with top-level try/catch return branches lowering to a Rust match statement with a trailing semicolon.
gaps.workaround: The local parseJson shape workaround was removed after the generic try_catch_tail_nonvoid fix landed.

gaps.reproduction: One-turn state-machine work exposed non-null interface/trait-object comparisons against null lowering to invalid generic pointer equality.
gaps.workaround: Compiler now evaluates non-null interface/null-literal comparisons to the correct constant result.

gaps.reproduction: Passing a literal null to an interface-typed parameter needed a generic nullable trait-object representation/lowering decision.
gaps.workaround: Resolved upstream: Null<Interface> and Null<polymorphic-base> lower to nullable HxDynRef<dyn Trait> handles; codex-hxrust can remove this as a compiler-gap workaround when the consuming ModelClient boundary needs nullable injection.

gaps.reproduction: Runtime event queue work exposed a method returning Null<ClassType> from Array<ClassType>.shift(); generated Rust returned HxRef<ClassType> while the expression lowered to Option<HxRef<ClassType>>, causing E0308.
gaps.workaround: The local queue API now uses a typed read outcome and indexed removal to keep generated Rust green; the compiler gap remains tracked upstream as a generic nullable Array.shift/class-return regression.
validation: haxe.rust-362 acceptance requires a product-neutral regression fixture

gaps.reproduction: TUI story replay summary work exposed unsupported lowering for class String field updates written as this.field += value; equivalent Haxe source using this.field = this.field + value compiles.
gaps.workaround: The local summary uses explicit assignment for string accumulation; the compiler gap remains tracked upstream as generic non-copy class field assign-op lowering work.
validation: haxe.rust-ojj acceptance requires a product-neutral regression fixture

gaps.reproduction: Turn runtime reducer work exposed Rust E0382 move-after-move errors when one String parameter was reused as the then-branch result for multiple conditional expressions feeding final markdown, last markdown, and notification fields.
gaps.workaround: The local reducer uses explicit semantic Haxe string slices via substr(0, length) while haxe.rust fixes clone insertion/reuse analysis for non-Copy local values generically.
validation: haxe.rust-fzl acceptance requires a product-neutral regression fixture

gaps.reproduction: Token usage replay delivery work exposed Rust E0433 when a same-class static final String was read from a static harness method; generated Rust referenced a crate-root class module that was not emitted.
gaps.workaround: The local delivery harness uses a helper function that returns the stable String literal while haxe.rust fixes static final/static var getter path lowering generically.
validation: haxe.rust-3f0g acceptance requires a product-neutral regression fixture

gaps.reproduction: Model catalog selection exposed Rust E0433 when Reflect.compare(left.modelId, right.modelId) was used inside a typed Array.sort comparator; generated Rust referenced Reflect::compare without emitting or importing a Reflect runtime type.
gaps.workaround: The local model catalog sort uses direct typed string comparisons while haxe.rust lowers Reflect.compare generically.
validation: haxe.rust-fz20 acceptance requires a product-neutral Reflect.compare regression fixture

gaps.reproduction: Turn model/tool planning work exposed Rust E0308 when a constructor parameter shaped as ?flag:Bool = false was assigned into a non-optional Bool field; generated Rust assigned Option<bool> into bool.
gaps.workaround: The local model catalog DTO now requires an explicit useResponsesLite Bool argument while haxe.rust fixes optional primitive default unwrapping generically.
validation: haxe.rust-3oju acceptance requires a product-neutral optional primitive constructor default regression fixture

gaps.reproduction: The HXCX-4.14 native SQLite metal boundary pulled in sys.db.ResultSet, whose results() signature reached haxe.ds.List. haxe.ds.List.iterator still emitted inline raw Rust and strict metal rejected the app.
gaps.workaround: Resolved upstream: List.iterator now calls a typed ListNative helper backed by haxe/ds/native/list_native.rs.

gaps.reproduction: The HXCX-4.14 native SQLite metal boundary pulled in sys.io.File through sys.db. sys.io.File static operations used inline raw Rust filesystem expressions, so strict metal rejected typed user code.
gaps.workaround: Resolved upstream: sys.io.File static operations now call a typed file_native helper backed by sys/io/native/file_native.rs.

gaps.reproduction: After sys.io.File was cleaned, HXCX-4.14 exposed FileInput/FileOutput handle reads, writes, seeks, flushes, and close calls as inline raw Rust expressions.
gaps.workaround: Resolved upstream: FileInput and FileOutput now call typed handle operations on the same file_native helper.

gaps.reproduction: The HXCX-4.15 native state adapter used a typed Haxe enum carrying class request payloads. Generated Rust derived PartialEq for the enum but HxRef<T> payloads did not implement PartialEq, causing E0369.
gaps.workaround: Resolved upstream: HxRef<T> now implements PartialEq/Eq using reference identity, with a product-neutral enum_ref_payload snapshot.

gaps.reproduction: Caf receipt/bridge path handling needed directory extraction, but haxe.io.Path.directory lowering was not reliable enough for the adapter slice.
gaps.workaround: Resolved upstream: haxe.io.Path.directory lowers through hxrt::path::directory with Haxe-compatible separator semantics; adapter code can use native Path.directory when the local helper is retired.

gaps.reproduction: Caf receipt/bridge filename handling needed last separator lookup, but String.lastIndexOf lowering was not reliable enough for the adapter slice.
gaps.workaround: Resolved upstream: String.lastIndexOf lowers through hxrt::string::last_index_of with optional start-index semantics; adapter code can use native String.lastIndexOf when the local helper is retired.
